trivia: The smallest E-Jet brought real-airline comfort to the 70-seat market: four-abreast seating with no middle seat anywhere on the airplane, a formula the whole family inherited.
Regional liveries change often, so the same E170 airframe may reappear in your Fleet wearing new colors year to year.
funFacts: No middle seats anywhere in the cabin.
Launched Embraer's rise to the world's third-largest airliner maker.
